description: Design a Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT) rotor with a Troposkein (skipping rope) geometry in QBlade. The design must utilize a NACA 0018 airfoil with a polar generated at Re=1,000,000 and extrapolated to 360 degrees. The rotor should consist of 2 blades with a height of 40 m, a radius of 20 m, a chord of 1.0 m, and at least 20 elements. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/troposkein_rotor.wpa.
